$description: Complete exercise database for the pitcher training system. Each exercise tagged for contextual retrieval by the bot.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Deadlift
exercises.pitching_relevance: Hip extension force production directly correlates with stride power and velocity. Trap bar variant reduces spinal shear vs. conventional, safer for in-season loading.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower B primary), Driveline, Gemini. In-season: use 85-90% of normal training weight.

exercises.name: Front Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: Anterior core bracing demand transfers to pitching delivery. Cressey explicitly prefers front squat over back squat for baseball players.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey (primary lower body for baseball), Tread (Lower A primary). Goblet squat substitute for <2yr experience.

exercises.name: Barbell Hip Thrust
exercises.pitching_relevance: Horizontal force production — translates to drive off the mound.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower B option), Contreras research.

exercises.name: Rear-Foot-Elevated Split Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: Directly mimics single-leg force production of pitching delivery. Addresses bilateral strength asymmetries.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower B unilateral), Cressey (single-leg on Day 3), Driveline off-season Day 3.

exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.pitching_relevance: Eccentric hamstring strength for deceleration in pitching delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower A posterior chain), universal programming.

exercises.name: Single-Leg RDL
exercises.pitching_relevance: Single-leg stability and posterior chain strength for landing mechanics.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower B posterior chain), Cressey.

exercises.name: Goblet Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: Foundational squat pattern for younger or less experienced lifters. Can substitute for front squat.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 1. Substitute for front squat for lifters with <2yr experience.

exercises.name: DB Reverse Lunge
exercises.pitching_relevance: Unilateral lower body strength with less knee stress than forward lunge.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season Day 1 accessory.

exercises.name: Landmine Lateral Lunge
exercises.pitching_relevance: Frontal plane strength for lateral drive off the mound. Addresses adductor strength which is critical for pitchers.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 2 primary.

exercises.name: High Box Step Up
exercises.pitching_relevance: Single-leg concentric strength development. Mimics driving up and over the front leg.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season Day 2 accessory.

exercises.name: Landmine RDL
exercises.pitching_relevance: Posterior chain development with guided bar path — good for learning hinge pattern.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 1.

exercises.name: DB Single-Leg Glute Bridge
exercises.pitching_relevance: Unilateral glute activation. Addresses asymmetries between drive leg and landing leg.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season Day 3 accessory.

exercises.name: Nordic Hamstring Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Eccentric hamstring strength for deceleration phase of pitching delivery.

strength.note: Build slowly. In-season keep volume low due to eccentric load.

exercises.source_notes: van der Horst injury prevention meta-analyses. Tread warns against excessive eccentrics in-season.

exercises.name: Rotational Med Ball Throw
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rotational power development directly correlates with throwing velocity.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline, Cressey (pre-lifting), Gemini. Cressey reduces med ball volume in-season.

exercises.name: Med Ball Scoop Toss
exercises.pitching_relevance: Low-to-high power pattern. Hip extension into rotation transfer.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline, Premier Pitching Performance.

exercises.name: Med Ball Overhead Slam
exercises.pitching_relevance: Deceleration training. Lat engagement pattern similar to throwing deceleration.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey Sports Performance.

exercises.name: Lateral Bounds
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lateral power for push-off phase. Glute med strength for pelvic stability during delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline, Gemini.

exercises.name: Broad Jump
exercises.pitching_relevance: Triple extension power development. Direct transfer to mound push-off.

power.intensity: MAX INTENT, full reset between reps

exercises.source_notes: Standard plyometric programming. Driveline in-season Day 1.

exercises.name: Weighted Chin-Up / Pull-Up
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lat strength for acceleration and deceleration phases. Cressey strongly endorses for pitchers.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey (strongly endorses for pitchers), Tread, Driveline.

exercises.name: Chest-Supported Row
exercises.pitching_relevance: Primary horizontal pulling movement. Volume should roughly double pushing. Workhorse pull exercise.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Upper A primary pull), Cressey, Gemini.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Cable Row
exercises.pitching_relevance: Anti-rotation demand during pulling builds core stability for throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Upper B pull), Cressey Sports Performance, Driveline Day 3.

exercises.name: Inverted Row
exercises.pitching_relevance: Scapular retraction strength with bodyweight. Good for beginners or recovery days.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 1.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.pitching_relevance: Posterior shoulder health. Can be performed almost daily as activation.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Upper A pull accessory), universal arm health programming.

exercises.name: Push-Up Variations
exercises.pitching_relevance: Primary in-season pressing movement. Allows free scapular movement unlike bench press. Cressey: 2 of 3 pressing days should be push-ups.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey (primary in-season pressing), Tread, Driveline.

exercises.name: Neutral-Grip DB Bench Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Horizontal pressing strength. Neutral grip reduces anterior shoulder stress. 1x/week max in-season.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Upper A main push), Cressey (1x/week in-season). Use 1-arm variations to allow scapular rotation.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling Landmine Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: THE substitute for overhead pressing. Allows scapular upward rotation without impingement risk.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (push accessory), Gemini, Driveline Day 3.

exercises.name: Half-Kneeling DB Overhead Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Vertical pressing with core engagement. Half-kneeling reduces compensation. Use with caution for pitchers — monitor for impingement.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 2. Landmine press preferred if any shoulder concerns.

exercises.name: Push-Up Plus
exercises.pitching_relevance: Serratus anterior activation for scapular protraction. Critical for healthy overhead arm action.
exercises.source_notes: Reinold, ASMI Thrower's Ten.

exercises.name: Prone Y-T-W-A Raises
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lower/mid trap and scapular stability. Critical for maintaining scapular upward rotation during throwing.
exercises.source_notes: ASMI Advanced Thrower's Ten, Gemini. Driveline calls these 'Swimmers'.

exercises.name: Rhythmic Stabilization
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rotator cuff co-contraction training. Builds dynamic shoulder stability under perturbation.

endurance.intensity: partner or self-applied perturbations at 90° abduction

exercises.source_notes: Reinold, Cressey (2x/week).

exercises.name: Bottoms-Up Kettlebell Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Reflexive rotator cuff engagement through grip-cuff connection. Builds shoulder stability.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey Sports Performance, Gemini.

exercises.name: Band External Rotation at 90°
exercises.pitching_relevance: External rotator strength for deceleration phase. ER:IR ratio should be >67%.
exercises.source_notes: Reinold, ASMI Thrower's Ten, Cressey (2x/week conventional cuff work), Driveline.

exercises.name: Band Internal Rotation
exercises.pitching_relevance: Internal rotator balance. Paired with ER work for rotator cuff health.
exercises.source_notes: ASMI Thrower's Ten.

exercises.name: Shoulder Internal Rotation ISO
exercises.pitching_relevance: Isometric IR strength for shoulder stability during acceleration phase.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 2.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Maintains posterior shoulder mobility. Prevents GIRD. Superior to sleeper stretch per Wilk et al. RCT.
exercises.source_notes: Wilk et al. RCT — superior to sleeper stretch. Gemini, Cressey, Tread all flag sleeper stretch impingement risk.

exercises.name: Band Pull-Apart
exercises.pitching_relevance: Can be daily warm-up. Builds posterior shoulder and scapular strength with minimal fatigue.
exercises.source_notes: Universal arm health, Jaeger, Driveline recovery protocol.

exercises.name: Band Reverse Fly
exercises.pitching_relevance: Posterior shoulder strengthening. Balances pressing movements.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 1 accessory.

exercises.name: Prone T Holds
exercises.pitching_relevance: Isometric scapular stability. Builds endurance in scapular retraction position.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season/in-season Day 3.

exercises.name: DB Wrist Flexion Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Primary UCL dynamic stabilizers. Builds fatigue resistance in muscles that protect the UCL during high-pitch-count outings.

strength.note: Perform AFTER throwing and AFTER lifting. Keep volume low per Tread warning.

exercises.source_notes: Lin & Anz 2025. LOW volume, HIGH frequency (2-3 sets x 10-15 reps, light, 3-4 days/week).

exercises.name: DB Wrist Extension Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Maintains flexor/extensor balance. Ratio should be 1:1.5 with flexors.
exercises.source_notes: Lin & Anz 2025. Paired with wrist flexion.

exercises.name: Pronator Teres Isolation
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pronator teres is a primary dynamic stabilizer of the UCL during acceleration. Builds fatigue resistance for UCL protection.

strength.intensity: light to moderate, 3-sec eccentric for sledgehammer variant

exercises.source_notes: Lin et al. 2018, Anz et al. 2010, Udall EMG analysis. Arm care adjustment xlsx includes full pronation and axial rotation variants.

exercises.name: Finger Flexion / Grip Training
exercises.pitching_relevance: Grip strength endurance for maintaining ball control late in outings.
exercises.source_notes: Saito et al. 2021.

exercises.name: Rice Bucket Work
exercises.pitching_relevance: Low-intensity forearm endurance and recovery. Good for post-throwing.
exercises.source_notes: ASMI supplementary.

exercises.name: Shaker Ball Series
exercises.pitching_relevance: Neuromuscular training for forearm and shoulder. Rapid stabilization demands.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx (pronator focus program).

exercises.name: Pallof Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Anti-rotation core strength. Resists rotational forces similar to those in the pitching delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Standard anti-rotation, Driveline Day 2.

exercises.name: Dead Bug
exercises.pitching_relevance: Anti-extension core stability. Can be daily warm-up movement.
exercises.source_notes: DNS-based core training, Driveline Day 3.

exercises.name: Ab Wheel Rollout
exercises.pitching_relevance: Loaded anti-extension. Builds trunk stability under load.
exercises.source_notes: McGill core stability research.

exercises.name: Side Plank
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lateral core stability for trunk control during pitching delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Lower A lateral core), McGill.

exercises.name: Farmer's Carry
exercises.pitching_relevance: Total body stability and grip endurance under load.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season Day 1.

exercises.name: Suitcase Carry
exercises.pitching_relevance: Anti-lateral flexion under load. Addresses asymmetries from dominant-side throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline off-season Day 3.

exercises.name: Wall Sit Serratus Scoop
exercises.pitching_relevance: Serratus activation with isometric lower body engagement. Multi-tasking arm care and lower body endurance.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx (pronator focus program).

exercises.name: Prone Snow Angel
exercises.pitching_relevance: Full-range scapular stability through arc of motion. Builds endurance in retraction/depression.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx (pronator focus program).

exercises.name: Eccentric Internal Rotation
exercises.pitching_relevance: Eccentric IR strength for controlling deceleration. Slow eccentric builds tissue resilience.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx. Tread warns against excessive eccentrics in-season.

exercises.name: Thoracic Rotation Eccentric Pec
exercises.pitching_relevance: T-spine rotation mobility is critical for separation in the delivery. Pec length maintenance.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx. Can use heavy band for eccentric pec lowering variant.

exercises.name: J-Band Routine
exercises.pitching_relevance: Standard pre-throw warm-up. 6 movements: forward fly, reverse fly, IR, ER, bicep curls, tricep extensions. Also used as post-throw recovery at reduced volume.

warmup.note: Every time you throw. Recovery version: 1 set of 10.

exercises.source_notes: Driveline standard protocol. Pre-throw: 10 reps each. Post-throw recovery: 1 set of 10 reps.

exercises.name: Wrist Weight Drills
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pre-throw forearm and shoulder activation. 4 drills: pronation swings, two-arm throws, pivot pickoffs, Cuban press.

warmup.note: Less than 10 reps OK when starting out — prioritize technique over volume.

exercises.source_notes: Driveline standard pre-throw protocol.

exercises.name: Upward Tosses
exercises.pitching_relevance: Low-stress post-throw recovery exercise. Promotes blood flow without high arm stress.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline post-practice recovery protocol.

exercises.name: Short Sprints
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pitchers rarely run more than 15 yards in a game. Sprint work develops explosive power without the negative effects of distance running.
exercises.source_notes: Cressey: Day 2 movement training. No distance running — sprint work and intervals only.

exercises.name: Sled Push/Drag
exercises.pitching_relevance: Recovery-friendly conditioning — no eccentric component means no DOMS.
exercises.source_notes: Tread (Conditioning B option).

exercises.name: BFR Forearm Protocol
exercises.pitching_relevance: BFR allows forearm hypertrophy at low loads. Builds tissue capacity for UCL protection without high mechanical stress.
exercises.source_notes: Casey & Bailey DIII study.

exercises.name: Pec Pallof
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pec engagement with anti-rotation demand. Maintains pec length and strength balance.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx (pronator focus program).

exercises.name: Supine Bilateral External Rotation
exercises.pitching_relevance: External rotation strengthening in a supported position. Reduces compensation patterns.
exercises.source_notes: Arm care adjustment xlsx (pronator focus program).

exercises.name: Calf Raise
exercises.pitching_relevance: Ankle stiffness for efficient force transfer during push-off and landing.
exercises.source_notes: Referenced in starter_7day template Day 4.

exercises.name: Arm Car Standing
exercises.pitching_relevance: Active ROM exploration for the shoulder joint. Identifies restrictions and promotes synovial fluid production.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light routine from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Pot Stir
exercises.pitching_relevance: Dynamic shoulder mobility through circular patterns. Promotes blood flow and joint lubrication.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light routine from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Driveline Cuff Swingers
exercises.pitching_relevance: Light rhythmic rotator cuff activation. Used in both pre-throw warmup and post-throw recovery.
exercises.source_notes: Dynamic Warmup + Post Throw from The Program xlsx. Used for blood flow in both contexts.

exercises.name: Flip Ups
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rapid wrist/forearm neuromuscular activation. Develops quick-twitch forearm coordination.
exercises.source_notes: Dynamic Warmup Option 1 from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Activation Ball Drops
exercises.pitching_relevance: Reactive grip training. Develops fast-twitch grip response needed for ball release consistency.
exercises.source_notes: Dynamic Warmup Option 1 from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Fingertip Ball Drops
exercises.pitching_relevance: Individual finger strength and dexterity. Builds finger-specific grip for pitch spin and control.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Heavy from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Flexor Pressout
exercises.pitching_relevance: Isometric flexor engagement with press-out pattern. Builds FPM endurance in a functional position.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light + Heavy + Dugout from The Program xlsx. Also in Brice Day A activate block.

exercises.name: Pronator Pressout
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pronator activation with isometric press-out. Primes the FPM for throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light + Dynamic Warmup from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Moving Flexor ISO
exercises.pitching_relevance: Isometric flexor engagement through range of motion. Builds FPM stability across joint angles.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Ulnar Deviation
exercises.pitching_relevance: Ulnar-side wrist stability. Balances radial/ulnar strength for consistent ball release.
exercises.source_notes: Brice Thoughts Day A activate block.

exercises.name: Finger Pop
exercises.pitching_relevance: Quick finger extension activation. Develops the release-side coordination for pitch spin.
exercises.source_notes: Brice Thoughts Day A activate block.

exercises.name: Ulnar Nerve Tensioner
exercises.pitching_relevance: Maintains ulnar nerve mobility through the cubital tunnel. Prevents nerve entrapment symptoms in throwers.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light + Brice Thoughts Day A mobilize block.

exercises.name: Median Nerve Glide
exercises.pitching_relevance: Maintains median nerve mobility. Prevents nerve tension that can contribute to forearm tightness.
exercises.source_notes: Brice Thoughts Day A mobilize block.

exercises.name: Chair Pose Snow Angel
exercises.pitching_relevance: Scapular upward rotation through full arc with isometric lower body demand. Multi-joint arm care.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Prone T ER Roll
exercises.pitching_relevance: Combines scapular retraction with external rotation. Builds the retraction-to-ER pattern needed for arm cocking.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Weighted PNF
exercises.pitching_relevance: Diagonal PNF patterns mimic the spiral arm path of throwing. Builds coordination across the kinetic chain.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Tall Kneeling Scapular Series
exercises.pitching_relevance: Three-position scapular endurance series (retraction, T, 90/90). Tall kneeling forces core engagement. Key arm care heavy exercise.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Heavy from The Program xlsx. Three positions done in sequence.

exercises.name: Modified Side Plank ER with Pressout + Ball Drop
exercises.pitching_relevance: Multi-demand exercise: lateral core stability + external rotation + grip/reaction from ball drops. High-value arm care heavy opener.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Heavy opener from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Tricep Kickback to Wrist Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Compound arm care movement targeting tricep (deceleration) and wrist flexors (UCL protection) in one exercise.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Heavy superset A2 from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Bicep Curl Pronator Pressout
exercises.pitching_relevance: Compound arm care: bicep (deceleration) flows into pronator activation (UCL protection). Efficient superset pairing.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Heavy superset B2 from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: ER on Knee
exercises.pitching_relevance: External rotation in supported position with assisted end-range reps. Builds ER strength + capacity.
exercises.source_notes: Brice Thoughts Day A activate block.

exercises.name: Scorpion
exercises.pitching_relevance: T-spine rotation + hip flexor stretch in one movement. Addresses two common pitcher restrictions.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Lat Hang
exercises.pitching_relevance: Passive lat and shoulder stretch. Restores overhead mobility lost from throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light from The Program xlsx. Also in Brice Thoughts Day A.

exercises.name: Modified Sleeper Contract-Relax
exercises.pitching_relevance: Modified version of sleeper stretch using contract-relax to gain IR ROM safely. Avoids traditional sleeper impingement risk.
exercises.source_notes: Arm Care Light + Post Throw from The Program xlsx. Modified version avoids impingement risk of traditional sleeper.

exercises.name: Wrist 3-Way Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Three-direction wrist stretch (flexion, extension, rotation). Restores forearm mobility post-throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Post Throw Stretch + Brice Thoughts Day A from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Open Book Pec Stretch with Lateral Hamstring
exercises.pitching_relevance: Combined pec length restoration + hamstring flexibility. Both commonly restricted in pitchers.
exercises.source_notes: Post Throw Stretch from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Pigeon with Wrist Flexor Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Dual-purpose stretch: hip ER mobility for delivery mechanics + wrist flexor restoration post-throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Post Throw Stretch from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Decel Swings
exercises.pitching_relevance: Controlled deceleration pattern with weighted ball or cuffs. Trains the eccentric braking muscles used in follow-through.
exercises.source_notes: Plyocare Recovery routine from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Gyro Ball
exercises.pitching_relevance: Gyroscopic resistance for forearm endurance and wrist stabilizer training. Low-impact forearm work suitable for dugout use.
exercises.source_notes: Dugout Routines from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Wrist Dribble
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rapid wrist flexion/extension coordination. Develops wrist snap timing for pitch release.
exercises.source_notes: Dugout Routines from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Heavy Ball Swing Series
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rhythmic arm swings with heavy plyo ball. Low-stress activation for rotator cuff and forearm between appearances.

warmup.reps: series of swings in multiple planes

exercises.source_notes: Dugout Routines from The Program xlsx.

exercises.name: Banded Hip Circle
exercises.pitching_relevance: Hip stabilizer activation improves single-leg balance through the delivery and reduces energy leak at foot strike.
exercises.source_notes: Common warmup exercise in pitcher training programs.

exercises.name: J-Band Forward Fly
exercises.pitching_relevance: Activates anterior chain involved in arm acceleration phase. Standard pre-throw warmup per Driveline protocol.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine.

exercises.name: J-Band Reverse Fly
exercises.pitching_relevance: Posterior shoulder activation critical for deceleration phase. Balances anterior-dominant throwing pattern.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine.

exercises.name: J-Band Internal Rotation
exercises.pitching_relevance: Internal rotation strength directly correlates with arm acceleration and velocity production.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine.

exercises.name: J-Band External Rotation
exercises.pitching_relevance: ER strength is the primary decelerator of the throwing arm. Preseason ER deficits predict in-season injury.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine. Evidence: preseason ER weakness associated with in-season injury.

exercises.name: J-Band Bicep Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Biceps act as dynamic UCL protector during arm deceleration. Pre-throw activation reduces valgus stress.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine.

exercises.name: J-Band Tricep Extension
exercises.pitching_relevance: Triceps provide elbow extension force during acceleration. Pre-throw activation improves arm speed and protects against medial elbow stress.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — J-Band routine.

exercises.name: Wrist Weight Pronation Swings
exercises.pitching_relevance: Pronation is the final force applicator at ball release. Wrist weight activation primes the pronator-flexor mass for throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — Wrist weight routine.

exercises.name: Wrist Weight Two-Arm Throws
exercises.pitching_relevance: Bilateral arm action pattern reinforces timing and coordination of forearm musculature before throwing.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — Wrist weight routine.

exercises.name: Wrist Weight Pivot Pickoffs
exercises.pitching_relevance: Mimics arm action of pickoff move with wrist weight resistance. Trains forearm load acceptance in throwing-specific pattern.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — Wrist weight routine.

exercises.name: Wrist Weight Cuban Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: External rotation through elevation pattern activates rotator cuff in a throwing-relevant arc. Prepares shoulder for overhead stress.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — Wrist weight routine.

exercises.name: Plyo Reverse Throws
exercises.pitching_relevance: Trains posterior shoulder to accept force from higher velocities. Develops T-spine mobility. Always performed first in plyo sequence.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — always first in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Pivot Picks
exercises.pitching_relevance: Develops efficient arm action and improved forward rotation. Trains arm path without lower-half complexity.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — always second in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Roll-Ins
exercises.pitching_relevance: Develops hip-shoulder separation — lower half stays open while upper half closes. Key movement pattern for velocity development.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — drill 3 in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Step Backs
exercises.pitching_relevance: Delays torso rotation and develops momentum toward the plate. Teaches sequencing of stride before rotation.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — drill 4 in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Drop Steps
exercises.pitching_relevance: Simulates mound momentum — gain ground toward target while delaying torso into foot plant. High transfer to mound delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — drill 5 in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Janitors
exercises.pitching_relevance: Constrained drop step — lower half rotates freely while upper half stays quiet. Trains lower-half-first rotation sequencing.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — drill 6 in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Rockers
exercises.pitching_relevance: Proper weight shift and timing of lead leg block. Trains the load-transfer pattern critical for velocity and arm health.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — drill 7 in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Plyo Walking Windups
exercises.pitching_relevance: Full integration drill — puts all movement patterns together with momentum. Always last in plyo sequence. Highest transfer to mound delivery.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — always last in plyo sequence.

exercises.name: Long Toss — Extension Throws
exercises.pitching_relevance: High-arc throws at increasing distance build arm strength and shoulder capacity. Extension-only days develop base throwing fitness without high arm stress.

build.reps: Work out to max distance, high arc
build.note: Start at 60ft, add 15-30ft per round, work back in lightly

compete.reps: Work out to max distance, high arc
compete.note: Extension to max, then compression throws on way back

exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — long toss program.

exercises.name: Long Toss — Compression Throws
exercises.pitching_relevance: Hard, on-a-line throws at 90-120ft simulate game-intent arm speed. Highest arm stress in long toss — develops competitive arm speed.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — Hybrid A+ only. Highest stress throwing activity.

exercises.name: Flat Ground Throws
exercises.pitching_relevance: Mound-like mechanics without the downhill slope. Lower stress than mound work while maintaining mechanical patterns and arm conditioning.
exercises.source_notes: Standard throwing modality across Driveline, Tread, and college programs.

exercises.name: Light Catch Play
exercises.pitching_relevance: Low-stress arm activity for recovery days. Maintains arm motion and blood flow without meaningful fatigue accumulation.
exercises.source_notes: Universal recovery throwing modality.

exercises.name: Short Box Bullpen
exercises.pitching_relevance: Mound reps at reduced distance (45-50ft) for feel and mechanics work without full-distance arm stress. Useful pre-start day or during return-to-throw.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week program — Recovery + Short Box day type.

exercises.name: Full Bullpen
exercises.pitching_relevance: Full-distance mound work simulating game conditions. Primary venue for pitch development, command work, and mechanical refinement between starts.

build.note: Mix fastball and off-speed, simulate innings

exercises.source_notes: Standard pitcher development modality across all programs.

exercises.name: Post-Throw Upward Tosses
exercises.pitching_relevance: Light deceleration work post-throwing. Flushes the posterior shoulder and promotes blood flow for recovery.
exercises.source_notes: Driveline 16-week throwing program — post-practice recovery protocol.

exercises.name: Back Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: Foundational lower-body strength. Bilateral quad and glute loading builds the base for rotational power and stride force.

power.note: Compensatory acceleration — max intent on concentric

exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts). Cressey prefers front squat for baseball but back squat acceptable for general strength.

exercises.name: Barbell Deadlift
exercises.pitching_relevance: Posterior chain strength foundational to high-velocity pitching. Conventional bar increases spinal shear vs trap bar — use trap bar in-season.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts). Prefer trap bar variant in-season.

exercises.name: Trap Bar Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: More upright torso than conventional squat — loads quads and glutes with reduced spinal shear. Good in-season compound option.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Trap Bar Squat Jumps
exercises.pitching_relevance: Develops rate of force development — directly transfers to explosive drive off the mound. Lower spinal load than barbell jump squats.

power.note: Max intent on takeoff — land softly and reset between reps

exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts). Driveline — ballistic lower body work for velocity development.

exercises.name: Barbell Reverse Lunge
exercises.pitching_relevance: Unilateral hip stability and single-leg strength. Reverse lunge reduces anterior knee shear vs. forward lunge — better for pitchers with knee history.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Barbell Bench Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: General upper-body pressing strength. Use sparingly in-season — prefer neutral-grip DB variants to reduce shoulder impingement risk. Off-season strength base builder.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts). Cressey: limit in-season; prefer DB/neutral-grip variants for shoulder health.

exercises.name: Incline Barbell Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Upper chest and anterior delt strength. Lower shoulder stress at incline angle vs. flat. Useful off-season pressing variant.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Pull-Up
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lat strength directly loads arm deceleration and scapular stability. Bodyweight pull-ups build relative strength without excessive load on shoulder structures.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts). Cressey staple for baseball lat development.

exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lat loading with load control — good substitute for pull-ups when managing fatigue or shoulder flags. Adjustable load makes it useful across all rotation days.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts, Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Barbell Row
exercises.pitching_relevance: Horizontal pulling for scapular retractor strength — counterbalances pressing volume and supports arm deceleration.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Dumbbell Row
exercises.pitching_relevance: Unilateral horizontal pulling — addresses side-to-side lat imbalances common in pitchers. Chest-supported variation available for low back protection.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Pin Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Trains pressing from a dead stop — eliminates stretch-shortening cycle and overloads the sticking point. Useful for pitchers with UCL/elbow history to control ROM.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Major Lifts).

exercises.name: Glute Ham Raise
exercises.pitching_relevance: Eccentric hamstring strength — high injury prevention value. Hamstring strain is a top soft-tissue injury for pitchers. GHR develops active eccentric control through full ROM.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts). Hamstring injury prevention evidence from Driveline and Cressey.

exercises.name: Copenhagen Plank
exercises.pitching_relevance: Adductor and groin strength — critical for pitchers who drive hard off the mound. Reduces groin/oblique strain risk in rotational athletes.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts). High evidence for groin injury prevention in kicking/throwing athletes.

exercises.name: Swiss Ball Hamstring Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Eccentric hamstring loading with hip extension component — bridges gap between isolated curl and GHR. No equipment barrier; useful when GHR machine unavailable.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Heel Elevated Goblet Squat
exercises.pitching_relevance: Heel elevation increases quad loading and reduces ankle dorsiflexion demand — good for pitchers with limited ankle mobility. Anterior chain strength for front-foot landing.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Dumbbell Walking Lunge
exercises.pitching_relevance: Dynamic single-leg loading with hip and knee stability demand. Builds stride-leg eccentric strength and drive-leg push-off power.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Tricep Pushdown
exercises.pitching_relevance: Tricep hypertrophy and elbow extension strength — important for arm deceleration and elbow stability. Low joint stress compared to free-weight skull crushers.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts). Rope pushdown URL from xlsx.

exercises.name: Straight Arm Pulldown
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lat isolation with minimal bicep involvement — reinforces arm deceleration musculature. Elbow stays extended, reducing UCL stress.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Dumbbell Lateral Raise
exercises.pitching_relevance: Medial deltoid development for shoulder cap stability. Keep loads light and range controlled for pitchers — avoid above shoulder height with impingement history.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Dumbbell Reverse Fly
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rear deltoid and scapular retractor strength — directly counteracts the heavy anterior shoulder use in throwing. Reduces impingement risk when done consistently.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Skull Crusher
exercises.pitching_relevance: Tricep mass and elbow extension strength. Monitor medial elbow stress for pitchers with UCL history — may substitute cable pushdown.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Hanging Leg Raise
exercises.pitching_relevance: Hip flexor and anterior core strength — critical for leg lift mechanics and maintaining posture through delivery. Lat loading during hang also beneficial.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Kneeling Landmine Press
exercises.pitching_relevance: Shoulder-friendly overhead press variant — neutral-to-internal grip path reduces impingement risk. Half-kneeling position demands hip-to-core stability that transfers to pitching delivery.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts). Cressey recommends landmine press for overhead-compromised pitchers.

exercises.name: Plyometric Push-Up
exercises.pitching_relevance: Upper-body rate of force development — elastic push-off speed transfers to arm acceleration. Low load makes it safe for in-season power maintenance.

power.note: Full takeoff — hands leave ground each rep

exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts).

exercises.name: Weighted I-T-Y
exercises.pitching_relevance: Scapular upward rotation and lower trap strength — directly supports arm health and reduces impingement risk. Essential for pitchers with scap/shoulder issues.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Accessory Lifts). Cressey and Driveline standard scapular health protocol.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Bicep hypertrophy for elbow flexion strength and forearm stability. EZ bar reduces wrist/elbow stress vs. straight bar — preferred for pitchers with elbow history.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Arms).

exercises.name: Overhead Tricep Extension
exercises.pitching_relevance: Long head of tricep is stressed in overhead position — important for arm deceleration. Overhead loading stretches the long head for full eccentric development.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Arms).

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
aliases: pronated grip EZ bar reverse curl
exercises.pitching_relevance: Brachioradialis and wrist extensor strength — supports forearm resilience and reduces medial elbow stress. Relevant for pitchers with UCL or flexor-pronator history.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Arms).

exercises.name: Cable Lateral Raise
exercises.pitching_relevance: Medial delt isolation with constant cable tension — better resistance curve than DB for shoulder stability work. Good accessory for pitchers needing shoulder balance.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Arms).

exercises.name: Med Ball Rotational Slam
exercises.pitching_relevance: Directly trains rotational power in the pitching plane — hip-to-shoulder separation and deceleration loading. One of the most transfer-specific exercises for velocity.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Med Ball). Driveline med ball protocols.

exercises.name: Med Ball Slam
exercises.pitching_relevance: Total body power in vertical plane — lat and core co-contraction with trunk flexion. Trains the deceleration musculature. Good warm-up explosive option.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Med Ball).

exercises.name: Med Ball Split Stance Throw
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rotational power from a split stance mimics the pitching position — trains hip-to-shoulder kinetic chain in a mechanically relevant position.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Med Ball). Driveline split stance series.

exercises.name: Med Ball Half Kneeling Rotational Throw
exercises.pitching_relevance: Rotational power with a fixed lower body — isolates trunk rotation and hip-shoulder separation. Good for isolating rotational deficits.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Med Ball).

exercises.name: Med Ball Back Facing Rotational Throw
exercises.pitching_relevance: Reactive hip extension and rotation starting from a counter-rotation position — trains the elastic energy storage and release of the pitching motion.
exercises.source_notes: UChicago exercise library (Med Ball).

exercises.name: Sleeper Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Restores internal rotation range lost from throwing. Tight posterior shoulder increases UCL stress and impingement risk.
exercises.source_notes: Standard posterior shoulder stretch. Evidence: GIRD reduction in overhead athletes.

exercises.name: Cross-Body Posterior Shoulder Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Targets posterior capsule tightness that accumulates from throwing. Complements sleeper stretch for full posterior shoulder recovery.
exercises.source_notes: Standard post-throwing stretch protocol.

exercises.name: Thoracic Rotation on Wall
exercises.pitching_relevance: Thoracic rotation is the primary driver of trunk rotation in the pitching delivery. Post-throw mobility work restores range and prevents stiffness.
exercises.source_notes: Standard thoracic mobility drill. Used in Driveline and Tread programs.

exercises.name: Standing Lat Stretch
exercises.pitching_relevance: Lats are the primary internal rotator and arm accelerator. Post-throw stretching prevents lat-driven shoulder impingement and maintains overhead range.
exercises.source_notes: Standard lat stretch for overhead athletes.
